title: White Cotton Gloves (2 Pack) 17cm x 9cm x 1.5cm - Comfortable Hand Protection & Stylish Design, Ideal for Skin Therapy & Overnight Cream Absorption
features: SLEEK & STYLISH DESIGN: The clean and classic white cotton finish suits any occasion, providing a professional and stylish look while offering the practical benefits of protection.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Made with high-quality cotton, our gloves provide a soft and snug fit for total comfort while wearing them.

MULTIPURPOSE HAND PROTECTION: Ideal for safeguarding sensitive skin, these gloves contains two pairs, assist in the healing process by preventing irritation. They are also great for handling delicate items while keeping your hands clean.
SKIN THERAPY COMPANION: Ideal for aiding in the absorption of creams and ointments, these gloves amplify the effects of skin treatments by helping your hands retain moisturizer during overnight wear.
NIVERSAL FIT: Thoughtfully designed with a one-size-fits-all dimension (17cm x 9cm x 1.5cm), these gloves accommodate most hand sizes with ease. Suitable for both men and women.
description: Product Description Play-tec 2 Pair Pack Dermatological White Cotton Gloves, Constructed From 100% Cotton, Soft and Comfortable, Help Protect Damaged Skin, Washable in Warm Soapy Water, Lightweight and Longer Life, One Size Fits All - Pack of 2 White moisturizing gloves are made of pure cotton, which are soft to touch and comfortable to wear, lightweight gloves won't make you uncomfortable when wearing, moisturizing cotton gloves have good alkali resistance. You can wash them with detergents, you are allowed to do some routine tasks while wearing these gloves, such as texting, driving, graphing, calling and more, these gloves won't keep you from your daily activities These white cotton gloves are ideal for persons whose hands suffer from dry cracked skin in the winter months and need to keep moisturizing cream applied overnight. They promote the absorption of creams and help prevent the staining of bedding and clothing Features: These White Cotton Gloves are constructed from 100% cotton and help cream and ointments absorb into the skin when worn overnight One size fits all Materials : Cotton Packaged Dimensions : 25cm x 21cm x 1.5cm Product Dimensions : 17cm x 9cm x 1.5cm Packaged Weight : 0.076kg Packaging : Plastic bag with hanging header card " Safety Warning No warning applicable
